events.title: Brian May turns 79
events.blurb: Queen's legendary guitarist Brian May celebrates his 79th birthday on July 19th.

angles.name: Guitar Legend
angles.copy: Wishing a very happy 79th to the iconic Brian May! What's your favourite Queen guitar solo?

events.title: Mick Jagger turns 83
events.blurb: The Rolling Stones' electrifying frontman, Mick Jagger, marks his 83rd birthday on July 26th.

angles.name: Still Rolling
angles.copy: 83 years young and still moving like Jagger! Happy Birthday to the one and only Mick Jagger. What's your top Stones track?

events.title: MTV launched 45 years ago
events.blurb: On August 1st, 1981, MTV officially launched, with The Buggles' 'Video Killed The Radio Star' being the very first music video ever aired.

angles.name: Video Killed The Radio Star
angles.copy: 45 years ago today, MTV launched with a song that ironically predicted its own impact. Did video really kill the radio star? We're still here!

events.title: Oasis's 'Definitely Maybe' turns 32
events.blurb: Oasis released their seminal debut album 'Definitely Maybe' on August 5th, 1994, kicking off the Britpop era.

angles.name: Britpop Classic
angles.copy: 32 years since Oasis dropped 'Definitely Maybe' and changed the sound of a generation. What's your standout track from this Britpop masterpiece?

events.title: Woodstock Festival 57th anniversary
events.blurb: The iconic Woodstock Music & Art Fair, a defining moment of the 1960s counterculture, took place from August 15-18, 1969.

angles.name: Peace & Music
angles.copy: 57 years since half a million people descended on a field for three days of peace, love, and music. What's your favourite Woodstock performance?

events.title: Anniversary of Elvis Presley's passing
events.blurb: August 16th marks the anniversary of the death of the King of Rock & Roll, Elvis Presley, who passed away in 1977.

angles.name: Remembering The King
angles.copy: Remembering Elvis Presley today, 49 years since we lost the King of Rock & Roll. His music and legend live on.

events.title: Anniversary of Tupac Shakur's tragic death
events.blurb: September 1st marks the anniversary of the shooting of influential rapper Tupac Shakur in Las Vegas in 1996; he passed away six days later on September 13th.

angles.name: Tupac's Legacy
angles.copy: Remembering the immense talent and lasting impact of Tupac Shakur today. His voice continues to resonate.

events.title: Anniversary of Jimi Hendrix's passing
events.blurb: September 2nd marks the anniversary of the death of guitar icon Jimi Hendrix, who passed away in 1970.

angles.name: Guitar God
angles.copy: Remembering the unparalleled genius of Jimi Hendrix today. His revolutionary guitar work changed music forever.

events.title: The Beatles' 'Abbey Road' turns 57
events.blurb: The Beatles released their iconic album 'Abbey Road' on September 4th, 1969, featuring that legendary zebra crossing cover.

angles.name: Iconic Album
angles.copy: 57 years since The Beatles gave us 'Abbey Road' and one of the most famous album covers in history. What's your favourite track from the album?

events.title: Chrissie Hynde turns 75
events.blurb: The Pretenders' formidable frontwoman, Chrissie Hynde, celebrates her 75th birthday on September 7th.

angles.name: Rock Icon
angles.copy: Happy 75th Birthday to the incredible Chrissie Hynde! A true rock icon with a voice that commands attention.

events.title: Liam Gallagher turns 54
events.blurb: Oasis and Beady Eye frontman Liam Gallagher celebrates his 54th birthday on September 21st.

angles.name: Rock 'n' Roll Star
angles.copy: Happy 54th Birthday to the one and only Liam Gallagher! Still bringing that pure rock 'n' roll energy. What's your favourite Liam moment?

events.title: John Lennon's 'Imagine' released 51 years ago
events.blurb: John Lennon released his timeless anthem 'Imagine' on October 1st, 1975, a song that continues to inspire peace.

angles.name: Timeless Message
angles.copy: 51 years since John Lennon gave us 'Imagine', a song whose message of peace is as powerful today as it ever was.

events.title: First iPod released 25 years ago
events.blurb: Apple unveiled the very first iPod on October 3rd, 2001, revolutionising how we listen to music.

angles.name: Music in Your Pocket
angles.copy: Remember the click wheel? 25 years ago, the original iPod dropped and changed music forever. How many songs did you cram onto yours?

events.title: Global James Bond Day
events.blurb: October 5th is Global James Bond Day, marking the premiere of the very first 007 film, 'Dr. No', in 1962.

angles.name: Shaken, Not Stirred
angles.copy: Happy Global James Bond Day! Raise a martini (shaken, not stirred, naturally) to 007. Who's your favourite Bond?

events.title: John Lennon would have been 86
events.blurb: October 9th marks what would have been the 86th birthday of The Beatles' co-founder and peace activist, John Lennon.

angles.name: Remembering a Visionary
angles.copy: On what would have been his 86th birthday, we remember the visionary artist and advocate for peace, John Lennon. His music and message endure.

events.title: John Cleese turns 87
events.blurb: British comedy legend John Cleese, known for Monty Python and Fawlty Towers, celebrates his 87th birthday on October 27th.

angles.name: Comedy Icon
angles.copy: Wishing a very happy 87th Birthday to the brilliant John Cleese! From Python to Fawlty Towers, a true master of British comedy.

events.title: The Beatles' 'White Album' turns 58
events.blurb: The Beatles released their self-titled double album, commonly known as 'The White Album', on November 2nd, 1968.

angles.name: White Album Legacy
angles.copy: 58 years since The Beatles delivered the diverse and experimental 'White Album'. Which track is your unexpected favourite from this double LP?
